spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(graph) && valid(node_buffer_ids) && valid(leaf_buffer_ids) && galloc->hash_set.size >= 1 && valid(galloc->hash_set.keys) && valid(galloc->hash_values) && valid_range(galloc->hash_values, 0, galloc->hash_set.size) && galloc->n_buffers > 0 && valid_range(galloc->buf_tallocs, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && (forall i: 0 <= i < galloc->n_buffers ==> valid(galloc->buf_tallocs[i])) && graph->n_nodes >= 0 && graph->n_leafs >= 0 && valid_range(graph->nodes, 0, graph->n_nodes) && valid_range(graph->leafs, 0, graph->n_leafs) && valid_range(galloc->bufts, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_nodes ==> valid(graph->nodes[i]) && valid_range(graph->nodes[i]->src, 0, GGML_MAX_SRC)) && (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_leafs ==> valid(graph->leafs[i])) && (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_nodes ==> get_node_buffer_id(node_buffer_ids, i) >= 0 && get_node_buffer_id(node_buffer_ids, i) < galloc->n_buffers) && (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_leafs ==> get_node_buffer_id(leaf_buffer_ids, i) >= 0 && get_node_buffer_id(leaf_buffer_ids, i) < galloc->n_buffers) && (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_nodes, forall j: 0 <= j < GGML_MAX_SRC ==> (graph->nodes[i]->src[j] != NULL ==> valid(graph->nodes[i]->src[j]) && (ggml_impl_is_view(graph->nodes[i]->src[j]) ==> valid(graph->nodes[i]->src[j]->view_src)))) && (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_nodes ==> (ggml_impl_is_view(graph->nodes[i]) && graph->nodes[i]->op != GGML_OP_NONE ==> valid(graph->nodes[i]->view_src)))
spec.postcondition: ensures (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_nodes ==> (graph->nodes[i]->view_src != NULL || graph->nodes[i]->data != NULL || (ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->nodes[i]) != NULL && ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->nodes[i])->buffer_id >= 0 && ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->nodes[i])->buffer_id < galloc->n_buffers && valid(ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->nodes[i])->addr)))) && (forall i: 0 <= i < graph->n_leafs ==> (graph->leafs[i]->view_src != NULL || graph->leafs[i]->data != NULL || (ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->leafs[i]) != NULL && ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->leafs[i])->buffer_id >= 0 && ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->leafs[i])->buffer_id < galloc->n_buffers && valid(ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, graph->leafs[i])->addr)))) && (forall tensor in graph: if tensor requires allocation then ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, tensor) != NULL && ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, tensor)->buffer_id >= 0 && ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, tensor)->buffer_id < galloc->n_buffers && valid(ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, tensor)->addr))
